@graph.name: Super Greedy trading controls
@graph.description: Core Super Greedy controls for futures market sessions, trade bias, detection modes, and execution settings.

itemListElement.name: Sessions
itemListElement.description: Detect trades during specific market sessions including Asian, London, and New York.

itemListElement.name: Bias
itemListElement.description: Choose whether Super Greedy should take Long, Short, or both setups.

itemListElement.name: Detections
itemListElement.description: Enable Trend, ORB, and Bullets detection modes before Super Greedy executes a trade.

itemListElement.name: Greedy Settings
itemListElement.description: Set chart, timeframe, contracts, and trade management rules so executions match your trading plan.

@graph.name: Trading Modes in Super Greedy
@graph.description: Multiple ways to use Super Greedy across practice, combine, and funded futures trading workflows.

itemListElement.name: Practice Mode
itemListElement.description: Test futures trading strategies before going live by adjusting sessions, bias settings, detections, and execution rules.

itemListElement.name: Combine Mode
itemListElement.description: Use your practice settings to pass a prop firm combine with the same sessions, detections, and execution rules.

itemListElement.name: Funded Mode
itemListElement.description: Fine-tune your strategy after you pass the combine and automate funded account trading with your preferred settings.

@graph.name: Let Super Greedy do the work.
@graph.description: Learn how to set up Super Greedy automated futures trading software, connect a futures account, configure trade rules, scan for setups, and automate execution in four steps.

step.name: Connect your futures trading account.
step.text: Connect Super Greedy to your TSX (TopstepX) account so it can read market data and place trades from one setup.

step.name: Set your futures trading strategy.
step.text: Choose the session, trade bias, timeframes, strategy, and risk parameters for Super Greedy to trade.

step.name: Automatically detect specified trade setups.
step.text: Super Greedy tracks different timeframes and contracts to detect high-probability futures trade setups.

step.name: Super Greedy executes the trade for you.
step.text: When a setup is detected, Super Greedy automatically places the trade for you.

acceptedAnswer.text: Super Greedy is automated futures trading software for ES, NQ, MES, and MNQ. It analyzes market conditions, follows your configured strategy settings, and executes trades automatically during market hours.

mainEntity.name: Does Super Greedy trade automatically without manual intervention?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Super Greedy detects setups, validates entries, and executes trades — including entry, stop placement, and take profit targets — automatically with no manual action required once configured.

mainEntity.name: How does Super Greedy detect setups?

acceptedAnswer.text: Super Greedy evaluates live market conditions using its automated strategy engine and your configured rules to detect setups before execution.

mainEntity.name: What markets does Super Greedy support?

acceptedAnswer.text: Super Greedy is built for futures markets including ES, NQ, MES, and MNQ, with additional instruments configurable based on your trading setup.

mainEntity.name: Is Super Greedy compatible with TopstepX?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Super Greedy is designed to work with TopstepX and includes configurable daily loss limits, max drawdown thresholds, and position sizing controls that align with TopstepX evaluation rules.

mainEntity.name: Does Super Greedy work with prop firm rules?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Super Greedy includes configurable risk parameters including daily loss limits, max drawdown thresholds, and position sizing controls that align with common prop firm evaluation rules.

mainEntity.name: Can I customize the strategy parameters?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Risk per trade, position sizing, daily loss limits, target levels, and timeframe preferences are all configurable so the strategy fits your style and account rules.
